topic: Consolidate and design the GOVERNANCE and ROLLOUT for the full data-quality program from all prior lineages (reuse-first 4-tier program, per-surface skill-doc/command/context-engineering automation, build-ready implementation with the shared safe-fix engine, novel out-of-the-box candidates). Produce: (1) a unified priority-ordered rollout sequence across on-write/retroactive/retrieval tiers with dependency order and safe-first staging; (2) the migration plan for the existing corpus (warn-then-error staging, backfill, coverage-guard gating); (3) the safety and governance model (safe vs guarded vs report-only auto-fixes, per-stage rollback, human-in-the-loop boundaries, idempotency and drift guards); (4) the measurement plan (prod-mode completeRecall@3 for retrieval, adherence and coverage metrics for write-time, how each tier earns its keep); (5) the consolidated NO-GO list and anti-patterns. Build on all prior lineages, do not repeat them; produce the governance and rollout synthesis layer that makes the whole program shippable and safe.
